content.speakerText: Hey, how's the client report coming along?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，客户报告进展怎么样了？

options.text: I'm about 75% done—I’ll finish by 3 PM.
It's not my job to report on it.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体进度（75%）和明确完成时间（3 PM），符合职场汇报的清晰性要求。选项A和C过于模糊，不符合‘避免只说还行’的使用说明；选项D回避责任，不符合团队协作语境。

content.speakerText: Can you send me the draft by noon?
content.speakerTextCn: 你中午前能把初稿发我吗？

options.text: Yes, I'll email it to you by 11:45.

content.explanation: 正确答案给出了明确的时间承诺（11:45），符合‘承诺时间要具体’的要求。选项A和D缺乏承诺感，选项C态度消极，都不符合职场专业回应标准。

content.speakerText: What’s the status on the quarterly analytics?
content.speakerTextCn: 季度数据分析的进展如何？

options.text: I've completed the data cleaning and am now running the models—targeting completion by 2 PM.
I think someone else is handling it.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了专业术语（data cleaning, running models）并给出明确时间节点，体现专业性和主动性。选项A太模糊，选项C和D推卸责任，均不符合晨会汇报的积极沟通原则。

content.template: I'm about ___ done—I'll finish by lunch.
content.hint: 汇报进度时常用百分比表达具体完成度
content.knowledgePoint: 百分比表达进度（场景高频词汇）

content.hint: 承诺交付时间时应使用具体钟点，避免模糊词
content.knowledgePoint: 具体时间承诺（场景核心句型）

content.template: I'm currently ___ the final slides before sending.
content.hint: 在完成前做最后润色的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：polish slides（场景惯用搭配）

content.speakerText: Hey, how's the client report coming along?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，客户报告进展怎么样了？
expectedAnswers: I'm about 85% done—final review starts after coffee.
Almost wrapped up! Just fixing a few charts.
Progressing well—I expect to hand it off by noon.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明了当前进度和预计完成时间
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的职场词汇（如 wrapping up, final review）
表达自然度：是否符合口语习惯，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否包含进度百分比、完成时间或润色动作等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Can you send me the draft by noon?
content.speakerTextCn: 你中午前能把初稿发我吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, I'll send it by 11:40—just waiting for the last data point.
I can, but I’d appreciate your input on the methodology section before I send it.
Absolutely—I’ve already drafted it and will email it at 11:20 for your review.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了时间承诺或提出合理前提
语言准确性：使用了恰当的礼貌表达（如 I’d appreciate）和专业术语（methodology section）
表达自然度：语句流畅，符合职场日常对话节奏
关键词覆盖：是否包含具体时间、反馈请求或发送动作等核心表达

expectedAnswers: We’ve onboarded 3 out of 5 new hires—training wraps up Friday.
All new members are set up with access; we’re doing orientation this afternoon.
Progress is steady—I’ve scheduled their first team sync for tomorrow.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明了当前状态和下一步计划
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了职场高频词（onboarded, orientation, sync）
表达自然度：表达简洁有力，符合晨会快速汇报风格
关键词覆盖：是否包含人数、时间节点、关键动作（如 scheduled, wraps up）
